description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a spacious, enclosed yard surrounded by a wooden fence. The front facade includes large arched windows and a central entryway, leading to a symmetrical arrangement of interior rooms. The property boasts a landscaped garden area with shrubs, trees, and a stone pathway, as well as a detached garage and a covered outdoor seating area. The exterior walls are finished in a light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are framed with dark trim. The backyard is expansive, with open green space and additional plantings for privacy and aesthetics. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large arched windows, landscaped garden, and a detached garage, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched windows, driveway, and garage with landscaped garden to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden area, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of rooms with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open green space, and the back entrances to the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional garden plantings, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing arched windows with additional side and rear windows
